summary: Iteration 43 testing completed for Tips (Pourboires) management feature. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Tips tab visible for all roles, Admin/Manager can create/edit/delete tips, Server sees only their own tips with 'Vue personnelle' badge and no edit/delete buttons, summary cards show correct totals, ranking card visible only for Admin/Manager.
seed_data_creation: Test tips created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 tested new Tips (Pourboires) management feature. Key test IDs: tab-tips, new-tip-btn, tip-amount-input (step='any'), tip-method-select, tip-attr-pool, tip-attr-server, tip-server-select, tip-save-btn, tip-edit-{id}, tip-delete-{id}, tips-day-total, tips-week-total, tips-ranking. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/tips, GET /api/tips/summary. Server role sees only their own tips (filtered by server_name), cannot create/edit/delete, and sees 'Vue personnelle' badge.

tests: POST /api/tips creates tip with attribution_type='pool' (no server_name needed)
POST /api/tips validates payment_method in {cash, mobile_money, card, other}
GET /api/tips returns tips list sorted by created_at desc
GET /api/tips with date_from/date_to filters date range
PUT /api/tips/{id} switching to pool clears server_name
PUT /api/tips/{id} switching to server without server_name returns 400
GET /api/tips/summary returns date, week_start, week_end, day, week, ranking
Day/week summaries include count, total, pool_total, server_total, by_payment_method
Ranking includes only server attribution tips aggregated by server_name
GET /api/tips/summary?server=X restricts to that server only
TipsTab component loads with header and summary cards
Modal opens with date, amount (step='any'), payment method, attribution toggle
Pool attribution is default, server select appears when 'Serveur' selected
Tip creation works, toast success shown, list refreshed
Summary cards (tips-day-total, tips-week-total) show correct values
Server sees ONLY their own tips (filtered server-side)
Summary cards show only server's own tips
